sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC = '5USA000092' and Contract  = ''
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set Txt = 'Ki Exec Reimb @[Yr]/[Mo] from ' + Contract + ' ' + GL, Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC = '5USA000092'

Update TransX set Txt = 'Ki Exec Reimb @[Yr]/[Mo] from ' + CC + ' ' + GL, Contract = CC, CC = '5USA000092', ProdCode = 'CHGBACK', Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not CC = '5USA000092'
Update x set x.GL = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on x.GL = y.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Reimburse' and ID = 'GL'

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,CC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Flex1) (select KeyID,GL,CC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,GL,CC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or FLex1 is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,PC,Txt,Contract,ProdCode,TP,Amt1) (select KeyID,'1998900' as GL,'5200000000' as PC,substring(Txt,1,len(Txt)-8),Contract,'' as ProdCode,'F0118' as TP,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,substring(Txt,1,len(Txt)-8),Contract)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
